Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 301}My third year is just around the corner.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 301}I spent the whole year stalking and being stalked.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 301}*sigh* I have to spend my time more wisely next year.[n]{f 1 1}
